epics.title: Payment Gateway Integration
epics.description: Integration with a payment gateway (Stripe) for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments and manage my subscriptions through a clean payment UI, so that I can easily track and control my payments
stories.description: Integration with Stripe payment gateway for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully processes credit card payments and updates the user's subscription status
The system sends email notifications for successful payments and generates receipts for payment records

tasks.title: Integrate Stripe payment gateway API for credit card payments
tasks.description: Implement Stripe API for payment processing and handle payment errors

tasks.title: Develop subscription management functionality with Stripe
tasks.description: Create and manage subscriptions, handle subscription updates and cancellations

tasks.title: Implement webhook handling for payment events and email notifications
tasks.description: Set up Stripe webhooks for payment events, generate receipts, and send email notifications for successful payments

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments and manage my subscriptions through a clean payment UI, so that I can easily purchase products and services
stories.description: Integration with Stripe payment gateway for credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling
acceptance_criteria: The system successfully processes credit card payments and updates the user's subscription status
The system sends email notifications for successful payments and generates receipts for payment records

tasks.title: Implement Stripe payment gateway API integration for credit card payments
tasks.description: Setup Stripe API keys, implement payment processing logic, and handle payment errors

tasks.title: Develop a clean payment UI and implement subscription management functionality
tasks.description: Design and implement a user-friendly payment UI, integrate with Stripe for subscription management, and handle webhook events for payment updates

stories.title: As a customer, I want to make credit card payments and manage my subscriptions through a clean payment UI, so that I can easily purchase products and services
stories.description: The system should integrate with Stripe payment gateway to enable credit card payments, subscription management, and payment event handling. The payment UI should be clean and user-friendly, and the system should generate receipts and send email notifications for successful payments.
acceptance_criteria: The system can successfully process credit card payments and create subscriptions through the Stripe payment gateway
The system generates receipts and sends email notifications for successful payments, and handles payment events such as subscription updates and cancellations

tasks.title: Implement Stripe payment gateway integration for credit card payments and subscription management
tasks.description: Set up Stripe API keys, implement payment form with credit card input fields, and handle payment processing and subscription creation

tasks.title: Develop clean payment UI and implement receipt generation and email notifications
tasks.description: Design and implement a clean payment UI, generate receipts for successful payments, and send email notifications to customers

epics.title: User Authentication System
epics.description: A comprehensive system for user authentication, including login, signup, password reset, and OAuth integration

stories.title: As a user, I want to have a comprehensive authentication system, so that I can securely access the application
stories.description: The system should include login, signup, password reset, and OAuth integration with Google and GitHub
acceptance_criteria: The system allows users to login with email and password
The system allows users to signup with email and password, and verifies the email address
The system allows users to reset their password and login with the new password

tasks.title: Design and implement the login page
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly login page with email and password fields, and integrate it with the backend authentication API

tasks.title: Implement user signup flow with email verification
tasks.description: Create a signup form that collects user information, sends a verification email, and verifies the email address before creating the user account

tasks.title: Integrate OAuth with Google and GitHub
tasks.description: Implement OAuth integration with Google and GitHub, allowing users to login with their social media accounts

tasks.title: Implement password reset functionality
tasks.description: Create a password reset form that sends a reset link to the user's email, and allows the user to reset their password

stories.title: As a user, I want to have a comprehensive authentication system, so that I can securely access the application
stories.description: The system should allow users to login, signup, reset passwords, and use OAuth integration for Google and GitHub
acceptance_criteria: The system allows users to successfully login with email and password
The system allows users to successfully signup and verify their email address
The system allows users to successfully reset their password and login with the new password

tasks.title: Design and implement the login page with email and password fields
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly login page with input validation and error handling

tasks.title: Develop the user signup flow with email verification
tasks.description: Create a signup flow that sends a verification email to the user and updates the user's status upon verification

tasks.title: Implement OAuth integration with Google and GitHub
tasks.description: Use OAuth protocols to allow users to login with their Google and GitHub accounts

stories.title: As a user, I want to authenticate using various methods, so that I can securely access the system
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using email/password, social login via OAuth, and recover their passwords
acceptance_criteria: The system allows users to login using email and password
The system allows users to login using social media accounts via OAuth
The system allows users to recover their passwords using a password recovery mechanism

tasks.title: Implement email/password login functionality
tasks.description: Design and implement the login page, including input validation and authentication logic

tasks.title: Integrate OAuth with Google and GitHub
tasks.description: Configure and implement OAuth integration with Google and GitHub, including redirect URLs and token handling

tasks.title: Develop password recovery and email verification mechanisms
tasks.description: Design and implement password recovery and email verification features, including email sending and token validation

stories.title: As a user, I want to securely authenticate using various methods, so that I can access the system safely and easily
stories.description: The system should allow users to login using email/password, social login via OAuth with Google and GitHub, and provide a secure password reset and recovery process
acceptance_criteria: The system allows users to successfully login using email and password
The system allows users to successfully login using social login via OAuth with Google and GitHub
The system sends a password reset email to the user's registered email address and allows them to reset their password

tasks.title: Implement email/password login and password reset functionality
tasks.description: Design and implement the login and password reset functionality using a secure password hashing algorithm and email service

tasks.title: Integrate OAuth with Google and GitHub for social login
tasks.description: Implement OAuth integration with Google and GitHub using their respective APIs and SDKs, and handle authentication callbacks

epics.title: Email Notification System
epics.description: A system for sending transactional emails to users for important events

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to implement an email notification system, so that users receive important transactional emails
stories.description: The email notification system will send transactional emails to users for important events such as welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications. The system will integrate with SendGrid or AWS SES and use email templates.
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a welcome email to new users with a valid email address within 1 minute of account creation
The system sends a password reset link to users who request a password reset within 1 minute of the request
The system sends a payment receipt to users after a successful payment within 1 minute of the payment

tasks.title: Design and implement email templates for transactional emails
tasks.description: Create email templates for welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications

tasks.title: Integrate the email notification system with SendGrid or AWS SES
tasks.description: Set up an account with SendGrid or AWS SES and integrate the email notification system with the chosen service

tasks.title: Implement the logic for sending transactional emails
tasks.description: Write code to send transactional emails to users for important events such as account creation, password reset, and payment

tasks.title: Test the email notification system
tasks.description: Test the email notification system to ensure it sends transactional emails correctly and integrates with SendGrid or AWS SES

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to implement an email notification system, so that users receive timely and relevant transactional emails
stories.description: The email notification system will send transactional emails to users for important events such as welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications. The system will integrate with SendGrid or AWS SES and use email templates.
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a welcome email to new users with a personalized message within 1 minute of account creation
The system sends a password reset link to users who request it, with a valid link that expires after 1 hour
The system sends a payment receipt to users after a successful payment, with a detailed breakdown of the transaction

tasks.title: Design and implement email templates for transactional emails
tasks.description: Create email templates for welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications using a templating engine

tasks.title: Integrate the email notification system with SendGrid or AWS SES
tasks.description: Set up an account with SendGrid or AWS SES, obtain API credentials, and integrate the email notification system with the chosen service

tasks.title: Implement email sending logic and queueing mechanism
tasks.description: Write code to send emails using the integrated email service, implement a queueing mechanism to handle email sending failures and retries, and test the email sending logic

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to implement an email notification system, so that users receive timely and relevant transactional emails
stories.description: The email notification system should be able to send various types of transactional emails, including welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications, using email templates and integrating with SendGrid or AWS SES
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a welcome email to new users with a verification link within 1 minute of account creation
The system sends a password reset link to users who request it, with the link expiring after 1 hour
The system sends payment receipts to users after a successful payment, with a link to view the receipt details

tasks.title: Design and implement email templates for transactional emails
tasks.description: Create email templates for welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications, with placeholders for dynamic content

tasks.title: Integrate the email notification system with SendGrid or AWS SES
tasks.description: Set up an account with SendGrid or AWS SES, configure the API keys and settings, and test the integration with the email notification system

tasks.title: Implement the email sending logic and queueing mechanism
tasks.description: Write the code to send emails using the email templates and integration with SendGrid or AWS SES, with a queueing mechanism to handle email sending failures and retries

stories.title: As a system administrator, I want to implement an email notification system, so that users receive important transactional emails
stories.description: The system should be able to send transactional emails for various events such as welcome emails, password reset links, payment receipts, and account notifications. It should also integrate with SendGrid or AWS SES and use customizable email templates.
acceptance_criteria: The system sends a welcome email to new users with a customizable template
The system sends a password reset link to users who request it, with a valid link that expires after 24 hours
The system sends a payment receipt to users after a successful payment, with details of the transaction

tasks.title: Integrate SendGrid or AWS SES with the email notification system
tasks.description: Set up an account with SendGrid or AWS SES, generate API keys, and integrate the email service with the notification system

tasks.title: Implement email templates and transactional email logic
tasks.description: Design and implement customizable email templates for different events, and write the logic for sending transactional emails based on system events

epics.title: Admin Dashboard
epics.description: A dashboard for internal team to manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to access a comprehensive dashboard, so that I can manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics
stories.description: The administrator dashboard should provide a centralized location for managing users, monitoring system health, viewing analytics, and configuring the platform
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays a list of all registered users with their roles and status
The dashboard displays real-time analytics, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics
The dashboard provides configuration management options for system settings and user permissions
The dashboard displays system health monitoring data, including error logs and performance metrics

tasks.title: Design and implement the dashboard layout and user interface
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly and intuitive design for the administrator dashboard, including layout, navigation, and visual elements

tasks.title: Develop the user management feature with CRUD operations
tasks.description: Implement create, read, update, and delete operations for user management, including role-based access control and user status management

tasks.title: Integrate analytics and monitoring components into the dashboard
tasks.description: Integrate real-time analytics, system health monitoring, and error logging components into the dashboard, using APIs and data visualization tools

tasks.title: Implement configuration management and security features
tasks.description: Develop and implement configuration management options for system settings and user permissions, including data encryption and access control

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to access a comprehensive dashboard, so that I can manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics
stories.description: The administrator dashboard should provide a centralized location for managing users, monitoring system health, viewing analytics, and configuring the platform
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays a list of all registered users with their roles and status
The dashboard shows real-time analytics, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics
The dashboard provides configuration management options for system settings and notifications
The dashboard displays error logs and system health monitoring data

tasks.title: Design and implement the dashboard layout and user interface
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly and responsive design for the dashboard, including layout, navigation, and visualization of key metrics

tasks.title: Develop the backend API for retrieving and updating user data, analytics, and system metrics
tasks.description: Create a RESTful API for fetching and updating user information, analytics data, and system metrics, with proper authentication and authorization

tasks.title: Integrate the dashboard with the backend API and implement data visualization and error handling
tasks.description: Connect the dashboard to the backend API, implement data visualization using a library such as D3.js, and handle errors and exceptions properly

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to access a comprehensive dashboard, so that I can manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics
stories.description: The administrator dashboard should provide a centralized location for managing users, monitoring system health, viewing analytics, and configuring the platform
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays a list of all registered users with their roles and status
The dashboard shows real-time analytics, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics
The dashboard provides configuration management options, such as setting system parameters and updating user roles
The dashboard displays error logs and system health monitoring information, including alerts for critical issues

tasks.title: Design and implement the dashboard layout and user interface
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly and intuitive dashboard design, including layout, navigation, and visualization of key metrics

tasks.title: Develop the backend API for retrieving and updating user data, analytics, and system health information
tasks.description: Create a RESTful API for fetching and updating user data, analytics, and system health information, including error handling and authentication

tasks.title: Implement data visualization and charting components for displaying analytics and system performance metrics
tasks.description: Use a data visualization library to create interactive and dynamic charts for displaying analytics and system performance metrics, including filtering and drill-down capabilities

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to access a comprehensive dashboard, so that I can manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics
stories.description: The administrator dashboard should provide a centralized location for managing users, monitoring system health, viewing analytics, and configuring the platform
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays a list of all registered users with their roles and status
The dashboard shows real-time analytics, including active users, revenue, and system performance metrics
The dashboard provides configuration management options, such as setting system parameters and updating user roles
The dashboard displays error logs and system health monitoring information, including alerts for critical issues

tasks.title: Design and implement the dashboard layout and user interface
tasks.description: Create a user-friendly and intuitive dashboard design, including layout, navigation, and visualization of key metrics

tasks.title: Develop the backend API for retrieving and updating dashboard data
tasks.description: Create a RESTful API for fetching user data, analytics, and system health information, as well as updating configuration settings

tasks.title: Implement data visualization and analytics components
tasks.description: Integrate data visualization libraries and tools to display real-time analytics, system performance metrics, and error logs on the dashboard

stories.title: As an administrator, I want to access a comprehensive dashboard, so that I can manage users, monitor the platform, and view analytics
stories.description: The dashboard should provide user management capabilities, analytics dashboards, system health monitoring, configuration management, real-time analytics, active users metrics, revenue metrics, system performance metrics, and error logs

The dashboard provides configuration management options for system settings and user permissions
